title: PRESCRIPTION MEDICINE ASSISTANCE TOOL - 211info
text: PARTNERSHIP FOR PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE PRESCRIPTION MEDICINE ASSISTANCE TOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A website search tool that helps connect patients to public and private assistance programs to help those with financial needs get access to their prescriptions. Website Eligibility: Varies by program. Programs generally focus on serving uninsured or underinsured individuals. Hours: Not applicable (571) 350-8643 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (571) 350-8643 Medicine Assistance Tool INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and complete an online form with information about the applicant's prescription medicines, income, and current prescription coverage. Applicants will receive a list of results with assistance programs for which they may be eligible. Apply to each assistance program individually. Search by drug, program, or company name to browse available assistance programs. Call for assistance if having difficulty navigating the website. FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Prescription Drug Patient Assistance Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
